name: Halibut Steaks Sorrento
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place four 12-inch squares of aluminum foil on a work surface.
3. Place one halibut steak in the center of each piece of foil.
4. Arrange tomato slices, slivered black olives, capers, and minced garlic on top of each halibut steak, followed by fresh parsley.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Drizzle olive oil over the fish.
7. Fold the foil over to create a sealed packet, ensuring no gaps remain.
8. Place the packets on a baking sheet.
9. Bake for 15 minutes.
9. Check one of the halibut packets; it should be opaque throughout and firm to the touch when done.
10. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
337 calories per serving. From: Syd's Cookbook.
